title: mesosphaerum alpestre
intro: Mesosphaerum alpestre, also known as mountain peppermint, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues due to its antimicrobial and carminative properties. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum alpestre include alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as supporting the immune system. Mesosphaerum alpestre can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
